title: Infosys InfyTQ Mock Test 1
description: Simulates the Infosys InfyTQ certification pattern: Reasoning, Mathematical Thinking, and Programming concepts.
questions: What is the time complexity of accessing an element in an array by index?
What traversal of a Binary Search Tree gives elements in sorted order?
What is the time complexity of Binary Search?
What is the average time complexity for insert, search, and delete operations in a Hash Table?
What are the four main pillars of Object-Oriented Programming?
What is method overriding in Java?
What is encapsulation and how is it achieved in Java?
What is the difference between an abstract class and an interface in Java?
What is the difference between WHERE and HAVING clauses in SQL?
What do the ACID properties of a database transaction stand for?
What does DNS stand for and what does it do?
Which HTTP method is conventionally used to update an existing resource entirely (replacing it)?
What HTTP status code should be returned when a resource is successfully created via a POST request?
What is the main advantage of using JWT (JSON Web Tokens) over traditional session-based authentication?
